zh.Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Culpeper於1418年出生在英國盧特藍德艾可頓時，她的父親John Culpeper37歲，母親Juliana Cromwell26歲。她於1433年與John Thomas Knight在英國盧特藍德艾可頓結婚。她去世於1476年在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾可頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰盧特藍德艾可頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Culpeper于1418年出生在英国盧特藍德艾可頓时，她的父亲John Culpeper37岁，母亲Juliana Cromwell26岁。她于1433年与John Thomas Knight在英国盧特藍德艾可頓结婚。她去世于1476年在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾可頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Culpeper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): from Middle English cul(l)en, coilen ‘to cull, select, gather’ (Old French coillir, from Latin colligere ‘to collect or gather’) + pep(p)er ‘pepper’, probably an occupational name for a herbalist or spicer.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Culpeper was born in 1418, in Exton, Rutland, England, her father, John Culpeper, was 37 and her mother, Juliana Cromwell, was 26. She married John Thomas Knight in 1433, in Exton, Rutland, England. She died in 1476, in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Culpeper est née en 1418, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, John Culpeper, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Juliana Cromwell, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Thomas Knight en 1433, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1476, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Culpeper 1418 in Exton, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Culpeper 37 und ihre Mutter Juliana Cromwell 26. Sie hat 1433 in Exton, Rutland, England John Thomas Knight geheiratet. Sie starb 1476 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Culpeper è nata il nel 1418 nel Exton, Rutland, England, sua padre, John Culpeper, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Juliana Cromwell, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Thomas Knight nel 1433, nel Exton, Rutland, England. Morì nel 1476, nel Exton, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Culpeperが1418年にイギリスルトランドエクストンで生まれた時，父John Culpeperは37歳，母Juliana Cromwellは26歳であった。1433年にイギリスルトランドエクストンでJohn Thomas Knightと結婚した。彼女は1476年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエクストンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Culpeper(이)가 1418년 영국 루틀랜드 스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Culpeper(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana Cromwell(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1433년 영국 루틀랜드 스턴에서 John Thomas Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 스턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom: Exton, Roteland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Culpeper nasceu em 1418, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Culpeper, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Cromwell, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Thomas Knight em 1433, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1476, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Culpeper родилась в 1418 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John Culpeper было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana Cromwell, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas Knight в 1433 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия. Она умерла в 1476 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Culpeper nació en 1418, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, John Culpeper, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Juliana Cromwell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Thomas Knight en 1433, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra. Murió en 1476, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
